import io

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  match string.parse_int(string.trim(s))
  when Some(score)
    if score >= 90
      print("A")
    else if score >= 75
      print("B")
    else if score >= 60
      print("C")
    else
      print("F")
    end
  when None
    print("F")
  end
when None
  print("F")
end
